title: Amtech - Rechargeable Portable Lamp for The Garage, Camping, and More, Home DIY, 4 LED Lights with 3 Adjustable Lighting Modes and Side Light, Lasts up to 6 Hours, Lightweight and Portable (10W)
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: LIGHTING STAPLE: Ideal for illuminating any task anywhere, including working under the hood of a car, in the workshop, garage, in the home, on camping trips, and more. A must-have for both professionals and DIY beginners!

SUPER BRIGHT: 4 LED lights with 3 adjustable modes (100%, approx. 70%, and flashing) and a versatile side light for illuminating larger areas. USB rechargeable with an operating time of up to 6 hours, and a battery life indicator so you won’t get caught out!
EASY TO USE: Lightweight and portable, you can take this light with you wherever you need it. It’s also been designed with an ergonomic carry handle that is comfortable for any hand to hold.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That's why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description DK Tools began 30 years ago as a small, family-run market stall in West London. Now, we’re in a state-of-the-art facility with eco-friendly lighting and are one of the UK’s leading tool supplier. From small fixes to big projects, we’ve got the tools and hardware you’ll need to do it yourself and the expertise to help you do it right. Power tools? Plumbing? Protective equipment? Yes, yes and yes. At DK Tools, we’re passionate about bridging the generational skills gap in DIY. Whether you’re a professional mechanic or construction worker, or someone taking the first step in their home DIY journey, we’ve got the tool for the job. Safety Warning No
